category_sources: Official GitHub README describes PyQt-builder as the PEP 517 compliant build system for PyQt.
source_facts.description says pyqt-builder is a tool to build PyQt.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses PyQt-builder.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to PyQt-builder documentation on Read the Docs.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Read the Docs documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README describes the PyQt-builder project.
Official Riverbank PyQt page links PyQt-builder Introduction to the Python-PyQt/PyQt-builder GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says PyQt-builder is a PEP 517 build system for PyQt and projects that extend PyQt.
